extDescription.message: Open every new tab in a new window.

actionTitleDisabled.description: Tooltip message for action icon when disabled

optionsWelcomeTitle.message: Welcome to New Tab, New Window Reloaded

optionsWelcomeBody.message: New tabs now open in their own window. Click the toolbar icon any time to turn this on or off. Fine-tune when and how below — changes save automatically.

optionsWindowSizeHint.message: Custom size is ignored when the position is set to Maximize.

optionsFocusNewWindow.message: Focus the new window when it opens

optionsTriggerLinkOnly.message: Only act on tabs opened from a link or page

optionsKeepExternalAsTab.message: Keep links opened from outside Chrome as tabs (don't open them in a new window)

optionsExcludePinned.message: Don't move pinned tabs into a new window

optionsMinTabsHint.message: Keep up to this many tabs in a window; tabs beyond that open in their own window. 0 or 1 means every new tab gets its own window.

optionsExcludeUrlsHint.message: One pattern per line. A line matches as a case-insensitive substring of the URL; use * as a wildcard (e.g. *://mail.google.com/*). Matching tabs stay as tabs.

optionsTestTitle.message: New Tab, New Window Reloaded — Test
